title: New Slay the Spire 2 update deletes its most controversial boss fight
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
The Doormaker is dead. Mega Crit's new Slay the Spire 2 update has just landed on the beta branch, and the developer has finally made the decision to put its most divisive enemy to bed and start fresh with a completely new creation. These latest StS 2 patch notes also introduce the first incarnation of the Bestiary, and a fresh helping of balance changes for the roguelike deckbuilder, led by some fairly notable Defect buffs.

Read the full story on PCGamesN: New Slay the Spire 2 update deletes its most controversial boss fight
